title: Integrated Applied Modeling and Communication · Error Forensics
summary: Answer an unfamiliar community planning question from raw requirements through a defensible recommendation. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an independently validated applied-math decision packet and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Iterate through question, assumptions, variables, model, computation, validation, and communication.
Compare candidate models and choose the simplest one that preserves material behavior.
Change material inputs and assumptions to identify which conclusions remain stable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Recalculate the repaired case
steps.instruction: A measured quantity starts at 22 units, changes by −9 units, then by +8 units. Calculate the final quantity. Use the result to decide Stakeholder Defense for an independently validated applied-math decision packet.
steps.why: The Stakeholder Defense result for an independently validated applied-math decision packet is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Preserve the signs and compute 22 − 9 + 8; compare with the starting scale. Reconcile the result with this competency evidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend a recommendation with calculations, visual evidence, alternatives, and clear next actions.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Before calculating Stakeholder Defense, predict the sign and approximate magnitude for an independently validated applied-math decision packet. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then reconcile it with that prediction and A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend a recommendation with calculations, visual evidence, alternatives, and clear next actions.

hints: Preserve the signs and compute 22 − 9 + 8; compare with the starting scale.
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0.001 of the exact value and includes units.
